features: PACKAGE & MATERIAL: Each pack contains 4 shower caps in 4 different colors. These disposable shower caps are made of a quality & durable PE material and are dust proof, non-toxic so effectively keep your hair from getting wet while bathing.
ELASTIC BAND DESIGN: Designed with a stretchable elastic band, these plastic shower caps fit all head sizes and keeps your hair dry in the shower. Bath cap can stretch up to 45 cm.
APPLICATIONS: These large hair caps can be used for showering, cooking, makeup, face cleansing, Spa treatment and even protects your hair from dust.
EASY TO CARRY: Due to its small volume, these shower hats are easy to carry no matter where you are travelling or for how long.
